ClaroSec Book a Consultation
Cybersecurity Consulting

Cybersecurity leadership for growing businesses — without the enterprise price tag.

ClaroSec helps small and mid-sized businesses understand their risks, fix what matters, and build real security posture — led by a cybersecurity professional with over a decade in telecom infrastructure.

Book a Free Consultation No pitch. No pressure. Just an honest assessment.
The challenge

You know you need better security.
You just don't know where to start.

Your business runs on its network, its data, and its people's trust. But you don't have a six-figure budget for a full-time security team — and the last thing you need is a vendor trying to sell you software you'll never fully use.

Meanwhile, the threats are real. Phishing attacks that target your employees. Vulnerabilities sitting unpatched in systems nobody's audited. Compliance requirements you're not sure you're meeting. One incident could cost you more than years of prevention.

You don't need a product. You need a partner who speaks your language, understands your business, and tells you exactly what to prioritize — and what can wait.

Services

What we do

01

Security Posture Assessment

A thorough review of your network, systems, and vulnerabilities — delivered as a clear, prioritized report with actionable recommendations. Not a 200-page document that collects dust. A roadmap you can actually follow.

02

Virtual CISO

Ongoing cybersecurity leadership on a retainer — strategic guidance, policy development, vendor assessments, and incident support. The expertise of a Chief Information Security Officer at a fraction of the cost of a full-time hire.

03

Compliance Gap Analysis

Where do you stand against frameworks like NIST, CIS Controls, or industry-specific requirements? We assess your current state, identify the gaps, and build a remediation plan that makes sense for your size and budget.

Our approach

Why work with us

10+

Years protecting critical telecom infrastructure that millions depend on every day.

ClaroSec was founded by a cybersecurity professional with over a decade of experience protecting critical telecom infrastructure — the networks that millions of people depend on every day.

That background means we understand real-world threats, not just textbook ones. We've managed security programs, led teams, navigated compliance audits, and responded to incidents in environments where downtime isn't an option.

We work exclusively with small and mid-sized businesses because we believe every company deserves serious security guidance — not just the ones with enterprise budgets. We explain things in plain English, we prioritize what actually reduces your risk, and we don't sell you things you don't need.

Who we work with

Industries we serve

  • Telecom providers and resellers
  • Managed service providers
  • Healthcare practices
  • Professional services firms
  • Any growing business that handles sensitive data

Let's start with a conversation.

Book a free 30-minute consultation. We'll talk about where your business stands today, what concerns you most, and whether ClaroSec is the right fit. No pitch, no pressure — just an honest assessment of your situation.

Schedule Your Free Consultation

Or email us directly at hello@clarosec.com
